name: wcag-accessibility-audit
description: WCAG 2.2 accessibility auditing for Claude Code. Combines source-level scanning (50+ patterns across HTML/CSS/JS/React/Vue/Svelte) with runtime verification via @axe-core/playwright or Chrome DevTools MCP Lighthouse when available, plus structured manual-review checklists. Generates reports with severity-prioritized findings, file:line locations, and code fixes mapped to all 86 normative WCAG 2.2 success criteria. Framework-aware: React/Next.js, Tailwind, MUI/Radix/Headless UI with runtime-behavior notes to prevent false positives. Use before launches, for compliance audits (ADA, Section 508), or when fixing reported accessibility issues.
